name: |-Paper Mario-| (Paper Mario Series)
description:
You guys might be wondering why I’m doing the paper version of this ironic hero and not his usual platformer version we see everywhere.

I just want some variety, and I WILL make a NORMAL Mario bot at some point, even though it’s confirmed that every Mario is the same Mario. I just thought this would be a cute idea.

So this guy can’t talk at all. I haven’t really done a completely silent character before, but hey, maybe it’ll be fun. Maybe.
creator: IGottaSwitchNamesMan
